wrong_login_details_message: The credentials you provided do not match our records.
no_login_challenge: Initiating a login into the App is currently not supported. Only external authentication is possible.
forgot_password_helptext: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
verify_helptext:
Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the
                link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verify_text_sent_to_your_mail: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration. Please note that accounts that are not verified within 24 hours will be deleted.
name: Name
password_requirements_title: Your password must meet the following requirements
password_requirement_2: Must contain atleast a lowercase and uppercase letter
cookie_notice: We only use functional cookies that are required for the website to function.
profile_username_notice: This is NOT your badge name. Changes will be possible at a later point.
profile_avatar_notice: This is NOT your badge avatar.
groups_page_staff_notice: If you are part of Eurofurence Staff, please ask your director for an invite.
staff_members_can_see_departments: As a staff member you are able to view the following departments.
developers_note: You can code? Get in touch!
too_many_attempts_email_verification: You can resend the verification email every 30 seconds.
too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please try again in :seconds seconds.
verify_code_resent: A new code has been sent to your email.
verify_code_expired: The code has expired. Please request a new one.
verify_code_invalid: The code is incorrect. Please try again.
pow_expired: Verification has expired. Please try again.
logged_out_subtitle: You have been successfully logged out.
logged_out_warning: We have asked all connected systems to log out, but some may keep an active session. If you are using a shared computer, it is highly recommended to clear your cookies and close the browser.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please reload the page and try again.
apps_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this app? This will revoke all access tokens and cannot be undone.
apps_secret_warning: Copy your client secret now. You will not be able to see it again.
apps_no_apps: You haven't created any apps yet.
apps_regenerate_confirm: Are you sure? This will invalidate the current secret. Your application will stop working until you update it with the new secret.
preferences_nsfw_description: I hereby confirm that I am at least 18 years old.
security_login_subtitle: How you sign in to your account
totp_protect_account: Protect your account with an authenticator app
totp_scan_qr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the code below.
totp_disable_instructions: Enter your password to disable the authenticator app.
yubikey_register_subtitle: Register a Yubikey for two-factor authentication
yubikey_remove_password: Enter your password to remove this key.
yubikey_tap_to_register: Tap your Yubikey to register it.
two_factor_description: Enabling two factor authentication secures your account by requiring a 2nd form of authentication for accessing your account.
staff_add_member_description: You can add existing Staff Members via the Dropdown to this Group. Non-Staff Members need to be added using the E-Mail.
staff_delete_team_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Team?
dev_open_auth_desc: We are using OpenID Connect and Oauth2 for Authentication.
dev_open_source_desc: We publish most of our code under the MIT License on our GitHub free for everyone to use.
dev_managed_servers_desc: We run our own Kubernetes system. You don't need to worry about deploying your project.
dev_our_projects_desc: Below you can see a grasp overview of our projects.
dev_want_to_add_desc: We are open to new integrations and projects, get in touch with us!
dev_checkout_docs: Meanwhile feel free to checkout the
backup_codes_subtitle: Use these codes to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator
backup_codes_save_warning: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
backup_codes_regenerate_warning: Regenerating will invalidate all existing backup codes.
backup_codes_low_warning: You're running low on backup codes. Consider regenerating.
backup_codes_none_warning: You have no backup codes remaining. Regenerate now.
two_factor_backup_code_link: Lost access? Use a backup code
security_confirm_password_subtitle: Please enter your password to continue
security_email_subtitle: Change the email address associated with your account
security_email_sent: We've sent a verification link to your new email address. Please check your inbox.
security_email_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
security_backup_codes_add_primary: Add a primary two-factor method to enable backup codes
account_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
